issuerName: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd.
issuerType: Exempt offering issuer; Section 3(c)(7) private fund
legalStructure: Exempt offering of securities under Securities Act Rule 506(c); issuer states it is excluded from Investment Company Act registration under Section 3(c)(7).

classification.classificationNote: BUIDL is treated as a tokenized fund/share-style Treasury and cash-equivalent RWA exposure. It should be graded with the asset_backed profile because legal structure, fund holdings, custody, reporting, and redemption evidence are central.

metadata.managementFeeNote: Guide requires a number or null; the lower bound of the RWA.xyz reported fee range is stored in managementFee and the raw range is retained here.
metadata.minimumInvestmentConflict: SEC Form D lists minimum outside investment as 100000 USD; RWA.xyz primary-market terms have been observed with higher minimum investment figures. SEC Form D is retained as the primary legal source for minimumInvestment.
dataGaps: No public prospectus/private placement memorandum URL found.
No public primary confirmation for fund administrator found.

_meta.notes: Updated to the Nexus RWA classification standard. Existing BUIDL research data was preserved; classification block and legacy fallback fields were added for profile-aware grading.
